product_overview: AuroraCraft is a web frontend that lets users register, authenticate, create and manage coding projects, and open a workspace-style IDE UI. It provides a multi-step project creation wizard and an authenticated dashboard with mock-backed admin and community pages.
core_goals: Allow users to register and authenticate securely and then access a personalized dashboard
Provide a guided multi-step Create Project wizard to configure and instantiate projects
Present a workspace-style IDE UI for project exploration and editing (UI-first, with mock data)
Offer basic project listing, search and sort in the dashboard
Ship admin and community pages as UI prototypes to support future backend integration

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate an existing user with email/username and password, then redirect to the dashboard on success.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email/username input -> Fill password input -> Click Sign In button -> Redirect to /dashboard -> View list of projects
Navigate to /login -> Fill email/username input -> Fill password input (invalid) -> Click Sign In button -> See error toast on invalid credentials -> Remain on /login

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Create a new user account with username, email and password (includes a password strength indicator); on success redirect to the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill username input -> Fill email input -> Fill password input and see strength indicator -> Fill confirm password input (matching) -> Check terms checkbox -> Click Create Account button -> Redirect to /dashboard -> View list of projects

Navigate to /register -> Fill username input -> Fill email input -> Fill password input and see strength indicator -> Fill confirm password input (different) -> Check terms checkbox -> Click Create Account button -> See error about passwords do not match -> Remain on /register

Navigate to /register -> Fill username input -> Fill email input -> Fill password input and see strength indicator -> Fill confirm password input (matching) -> Check terms checkbox -> Click Create Account button -> API responds with error -> See API error message -> Remain on /register

features.name: Dashboard Projects
features.description: Authenticated dashboard that lists projects with search and sort controls and a CTA to create new projects.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View list of projects -> Search projects using search bar -> See filtered results -> Sort projects using select dropdown -> Click Create Project button -> Navigate to /projects/new
Navigate to /dashboard -> Search projects using search bar with no matches -> See no projects found message -> Remain on /dashboard
Navigate to /dashboard (unauthenticated) -> Redirect to /login -> See prompt to sign in

features.name: Create Project Wizard
features.description: A multi-step wizard at /projects/new that collects project name/description, type, configuration (software, language, Java version, compiler), and source template, then creates the project.
user_flows: Navigate to /projects/new -> Enter project name and description -> Click Proceed to Type step -> Select project type -> Click Proceed to Configuration step -> Select software, language, java version, compiler -> Click Proceed to Source step -> Select source template -> Click Create Project button -> Redirect to /workspace/123 -> See new project workspace
Navigate to /projects/new -> Leave project name blank -> Click Proceed to Type step -> See validation error for required project name -> Remain on project information step
Navigate to /projects/new -> Complete all steps correctly -> Click Create Project button -> API returns error -> See error message about project creation failure -> Remain on /projects/new

features.name: Workspace IDE
features.description: A three-panel workspace UI at /workspace/:projectId showing a file tree, Monaco editor panel, and chat/auxiliary panel; currently a UI-first experience with hardcoded data.
user_flows: Navigate to /workspace/123 -> Click files in the file tree panel -> View code in the Monaco editor panel -> Click tabs in the chat panel -> Toggle visibility settings -> See updated layout
Navigate to /workspace/123 -> Click files in the file tree panel -> Observe that file content does not change or editor is static -> See notice that workspace is UI only and non-functional

routes.description: Homepage with hero, features, and CTA
User registration page with password strength indicator
Project workspace with file tree and editor

known_limitations.impact: Created projects are not persisted or displayed correctly
All admin tables show mock data and actions do not work
File tree is hardcoded, editor is static, chat panel is non-functional
Searching filters hardcoded mock data only
